ddls:
CREATE TABLE "derivatives" (
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of derivative */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of derivative (e.g., Futures & Forwards, Swaps) */,
  "q3_2009" REAL /* Value in billions for Q3 2009 */,
  "q2_2009" REAL /* Value in billions for Q2 2009 */,
  "dollar_change" REAL /* Dollar change between Q2 and Q3 */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percent change between Q2 and Q3 */,
  "percent_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total derivatives market */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the values are reported */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry to which the derivative belongs */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derivative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the derivative type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value in billions */,
  "change" REAL /* Change since the previous data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_derivative_id FOREIGN KEY ("derivative_id") REFERENCES derivatives ("derivative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data used */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail image of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object related to the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
